title: Why Morocco game could be greatest of all for Scotland
description: Scotland will need their best display since Steve Clarke took over to achieve the result against Morocco that will secure knockout tournament football for the first time, writes Tom English.

title: Coventry play champions Arsenal in Premier League opener
description: Newly promoted Coventry City will travel to champions Arsenal in the first match of the 2026-27 Premier League season.

title: Moutet loses almost all prize money for swearing on BBC TV
description: France's Corentin Moutet loses almost his entire Queen's prize money after being fined $40,000 for swearing seven times in a live BBC television interview.

title: Stick or twist? Rashford and Guehi are Tuchel's big dilemmas
description: Before England's World Cup match against Ghana on Tuesday, BBC Sport's Phil McNulty looks at Thomas Tuchel's big selection dilemmas.

title: A heavily jeered $250m goldmine - are hydration break ads here to stay?
description: BBC Sport explores how hydration break ads work in other countries and how they could impact the future of football.

title: The maths whizz turned teen star who chose Morocco over France
description: Get to know Ayyoub Bouaddi - Morocco's new star.

title: Former England goalkeeper Earps joins London City Lionesses
description: Former England goalkeeper Mary Earps joins London City Lionesses on a two-year deal after leaving Paris St-Germain.

title: Nike v Adidas - the World Cup brand battle
description: Eye-watering budgets are nothing new, but this year both Nike and Adidas have gone bigger and bolder than ever before in the fight for World Cup attention.
